Module Pj2_2025
Package model

Class Station

java.lang.Object
model.Station
public class Station extends Object
Represents a transportation hub within a city, encompassing both a bus station and a train station. This class stores the name of the city it belongs to, along with unique identifiers for its bus and train stations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    busStation
    The unique identifier or name of the bus station within this city.
    String
    city
    The name of the city where this station is located.
    String
    trainStation
    The unique identifier or name of the train station within this city.

      public void setTrainStation(String trainStation)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Provides a string representation of the Station object, displaying the city, bus station, and train station names. This method is useful for debugging and logging purposes.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A formatted string containing the station's details.
